title: A way of person transportation and facilities for providing this way of transport
abstract: The way of person transportation and facilities for providing this way of transport consist in transporting of persons during the whole transport time in the only transport unit (5, 6, 7) equipped for either road or railway transportation and enabling passengers to leave this transport unit and to relocate to any other part of the train within the rail transport phase. The facility for providing this way of transport is composed of the transport unit (5, 6, 7) equipped for independent movement on roads and furnished for person stay inside the unit (5, 6, 7). The facility for providing this way of transport includes the transport unit (5, 6, 7) that can be converted for day and night regime. The facility for providing this way of transport is composed of the transport unit (5, 6, 7) with its own undercarriage that can be constructed in a detachable or inseparable version. The facility for providing this way of transport is composed of the transport unit (5, 6, 7) adjusted to a closely packed parking.
claims: Claims Patent Claims 1. The way of person transportation and facilities for providing this way of transport characterized by the fact that during the whole transport time transported persons are in the only transport unit (5, 6, 7) designated for either road or railway transport and can leave this transport unit (5, 6, 7) within the rail transport phase and relocate to any other part of the train, and the fact that the transport unit (5, 6, 7) is loaded up by a loading mechanism (8) on the transport platform (1, 2) on which it remains up to the terminal station where it is either relocated to another transport platform (1, 2) of a different train or continues traveling independently using roads. 2. Facilities for providing this way of transport, according to the Patent Claim 1, characterized by the composition of the transport unit (5, 6, 7) which is equipped with parts for independent movement on the roads and is furnished with equipment for person stay inside the transport unit (5, 6, 7) and by the fact that this transport unit (5, 6, 7) is connected to electric power source of the rail car and is attached mechanically to the transport platform (1, 2). 3. Facilities for providing this way of transport, according to the Patent Claim 2, characterized by the fact that the transport unit (5, 6, 7) has its own undercarriage that can be designed as an inseparable part of the transport unit or can be constructed in a detachable version.
